item.title: 亨利·布洛杰特谈软件抛售恐慌及其对OpenAI的挑战
item.description:
人工智能将如何影响媒体与软件行业。

【原文：

How AI will affect both media and software.

】

item.title: 零散股：亨利·布洛杰特谈OpenAI面临的困境（播客）
item.description: 一年前，所有讨论都围绕着大型人工智能公司被严重高估展开。人人都称其为泡沫。 时至今日，市场主流观点却认为人工智能威力如此强大，各类传统行业——尤其是软件领域——都可能走向消亡。真相究竟何在？人工智能估值又将何去何从？本期节目于2月25日在布鲁克林On Air播客节现场录制，我们再度邀请到前华尔街分析师亨利·布洛杰特展开探讨。【原文：A year ago, all of the talk was about how the big AI companies were wildly overvalued. Everyone was calling it a bubble. Fast forward to now, and a dominant idea in the markets is that AI is so powerful that all kinds of legacy businesses — particularly software — could go to zero. So where does the truth lie? And what now for AI valuations? On this episode, recorded live at the On Air podcast festival in Brooklyn on February 25, we catch up again with Henry Blodget, the former Wall Street analy】

item.title: 欧洲央行加息押注考验官员们保持冷静的努力
item.description: 欧洲央行试图在战争和通胀问题上保持冷静的努力正面临考验，因为市场已将今年加息的预期纳入定价。【原文：European Central Bank efforts to project calm over war and inflation are being tested as markets price in a hike in interest rates this year.】

item.title: 网易将停止对名越工作室的资金支持，因其正缩减游戏业务
item.description: 网易公司将停止对由《如龙》系列创作者名越稔洋领导的工作室的资金支持，这是该公司收缩游戏开发业务的整体战略中最新受影响的部门。【原文：NetEase Inc. will cut off funding to the studio led by Yakuza franchise creator Toshihiro Nagoshi, the latest to be affected by the Chinese company’s broader strategy to shrink game development activities.】

item.title: 沙特阿拉伯拦截飞向沙伊巴油田的无人机
item.description: 据沙特官方通讯社SPA报道，沙特阿拉伯在空旷沙漠地区拦截了数架无人机，这些无人机正朝沙伊巴油田方向飞去。该油田日均原油产量可达100万桶。【原文：Saudi Arabia intercepted drones in the Empty Quarter desert that were heading toward the Shaybah oil field, which has the capacity to produce 1 million barrels of crude a day, according to state-run SPA.】

item.title: 迪拜阿联酋航空因导弹威胁再度停飞
item.description: 迪拜的阿联酋航空周六再次暂停航班，此前又一轮拦截行动进一步扰乱了这家全球最大航空公司的运营。【原文：Dubai’s Emirates suspended flights again on Saturday after another round of interceptions further disrupted operations at the world’s largest airline.】

item.title: 印度上调液化石油气价格，霍尔木兹海峡危机导致供应受阻
item.description: 印度一年来首次上调最常用烹饪燃气价格，因伊朗战争扰乱中东能源供应，推高全球燃料成本。【原文：India raised prices of its most widely used cooking gas for the first time in a year, as the Iran war disrupted Middle East energy flows and sent global fuel costs higher.】

item.title: 中国敦促高危人群接受癌症筛查
item.description: 中国卫生部呼吁潜在风险人群接受癌症筛查，这是该国为加强癌症防治工作所采取的更广泛举措之一。【原文：China’s health ministry urged people at potential risk to undergo cancer screenings as part of a broader push to improve prevention and control of the disease.】

item.title: 中国转向人工智能领域，求职者数量已超过比利时总人口
item.description: 中国将利用人工智能创造就业岗位，因为今年即将进入劳动力市场的大学毕业生人数将达到1270万——超过比利时等国的人口总数。【原文：China will harness artificial intelligence to create jobs as the number of university graduates poised to enter the labor market this year will reach 12.7 million — more than the population of countries such as Belgium.】

item.title: 任天堂提起诉讼，要求就特朗普关税获得退款
item.description: 任天堂公司周五向美国国际贸易法院提起诉讼，要求退还因特朗普总统加征关税而向美国政府缴纳的关税。【原文：Nintendo Co. filed a lawsuit in the US Court of International Trade on Friday, seeking a refund for duties it paid to the US government as a result of President Donald Trump’s Tariffs.】

item.title: 中国央行扩大黄金购买规模，中东局势持续紧张
item.description: 中国央行2月份继续增持黄金，将连续购金周期延长至16个月。随着中东局势紧张升级，金价持续攀升。【原文：China’s central bank bought more gold in February, extending its streak of purchasing to 16 months, as bullion climbs amid escalating Middle East tensions.】

item.title: 格里尔、施瓦茨曼将出席美国澳大利亚养老金峰会
item.description: 澳大利亚养老金行业规模达4.5万亿澳元（约合3.2万亿美元），该行业的代表将于下周前往美国，旨在展示该行业在全球最大经济体中的投资规模。【原文：Representatives of the A$4.5 trillion ($3.2 trillion) Australian pensions industry will head to the US next week, seeking to showcase the scale of the sector’s investments in the world’s largest economy.】

item.title: 日本寻求豁免于美国关税上调，因贸易问题引发担忧
item.description: 日本已请求美国免除其原定从10%上调至15%的关税计划——这凸显出人们担忧关税提高可能冲击该国汽车产业。【原文：Japan has asked the US to spare it from a planned tariff increase from 10% to 15% — underscoring fears that higher duties could hit the country’s automobile industry.】

item.title: 亚洲应对燃油短缺：排长队、涨油价、缺供应
item.description: 从泰国农民争抢柴油，到印度炼油厂高管彻夜监控波斯湾局势，整个依赖进口的亚洲地区，能源采购商们正感受到这场能源危机带来的剧烈冲击。【原文：From Thai farmers racing for diesel to Indian refinery executives monitoring the Persian Gulf through the night, energy buyers across import-dependent Asia are feeling the impact of a dramatic crunch.】

item.title: 马斯克对垃圾信息的挫败感让前推特高管们感到"困惑"
item.description: 推特公司两名前高管在陪审团审判中试图反驳埃隆·马斯克的说法，后者指控他们在2022年收购公司期间，就该平台用户群构成向其隐瞒了真相。【原文：Two former top executives at Twitter Inc. sought to beat back Elon Musk’s narrative at a jury trial that they lied to him about the makeup of the platform’s user base when he was purchasing the company in 2022.】

item.title: 诺沃与Hims结束纷争，将联合销售减肥药物
item.description: 据知情人士透露，诺和诺德公司计划通过Hims & Hers Health Inc.的平台销售其减肥药物，此举将结束两家公司之间备受瞩目的纷争——该纠纷上月已升级为法律诉讼。【原文：Novo Nordisk A/S plans to sell its weight-loss drugs on Hims & Hers Health Inc.’s platform, according to a person familiar with the matter, ending a highly public feud between the two companies that spiraled into a legal battle last month.】

item.title: 蓝猫领投7.5亿美元债务融资，助力Vista收购Nexthink
item.description: 蓝猫资本公司牵头为Vista Equity Partners收购软件公司Nexthink SA提供了7.5亿美元债务融资，这凸显出即使在流动性担忧和对人工智能驱动的颠覆性影响的不安情绪笼罩市场之际，私募信贷市场依然保持着强劲需求。【原文：Blue Owl Capital Inc. led a $750 million debt financing for Vista Equity Partners’ buyout of software company Nexthink SA, underscoring continued appetite for private credit even as liquidity concerns and unease over AI-driven disruption weigh on the market.】

item.title: 当上帝出现在合同中，那便是“不可抗力”
item.description: 中东新战事让法律术语"不可抗力"再度引发关注。这项条款常被埋藏在诸多合同中，允许当事方在遭遇某些无法预见的"天灾"时免于承担责任。【原文：The new war in the Middle East has given fresh relevance to the legal term “force majeure.” It’s a clause that can be found buried in many contracts that lets a party off the hook in the event of some unforeseen “act of God.”】

item.title: 维谛技术、Lumentum、Coherent和EchoStar将于本月加入标普500指数
item.description: 标准普尔道琼斯指数公司周五宣布，维谛技术控股公司、Lumentum控股公司、Coherent公司和EchoStar公司将在最新季度指数调整中加入标普500指数。【原文：Vertiv Holdings Co., Lumentum Holdings Inc., Coherent Corp. and EchoStar Corp. will join the S&P 500 in the latest quarterly rebalance, S&P Dow Jones Indices said Friday.】

item.title: 韩国电动汽车电池制造商SK在佐治亚州裁员958人
item.description: SK创新公司旗下电池部门正裁减其佐治亚州工厂逾三分之一员工，这家韩国制造商正面临电动汽车销量放缓的困境。【原文：The battery unit of SK Innovation Co. is laying off more than a third of the workforce at its plant in Georgia as the South Korean manufacturer navigates a slowdown in electric vehicle sales.】

item.title: 肯尼迪-威尔逊债券持有人组织起来抵制要约收购
item.description: 据知情人士透露，持有肯尼迪-威尔逊公司多数债券的一批投资者计划放弃该公司的债务置换要约，转而寻求现金支付。【原文：A group of investors holding a majority of Kennedy-Wilson Inc. bonds plan to skip the company’s debt exchange offer and instead seek a cash payment, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 贝森特称美国可能在印度之后对更多俄罗斯石油解除制裁
item.description: 财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，在周四批准印度炼油商从俄罗斯购买原油后，美国可能对俄罗斯进一步供应石油解除制裁。【原文：Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US may lift sanctions on further Russian oil supply after a move Thursday to give Indian refiners the green light to purchase crude from the nation.】

item.title: 美联储鲍曼称劳动力市场可能需要更多支持
item.description: 美联储负责监管事务的副主席米歇尔·鲍曼表示，2月份就业报告表现弱于预期，这使她重新倾向于支持进一步降息。【原文：Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision Michelle Bowman signaled the weaker-than-expected February employment report has tilted her back to supporting additional interest-rate cuts.】

item.title: 华尔街的安全网正逐渐失效，伊朗战争冲击市场
item.description: 伊朗战争本周虽令华尔街动荡，却未将其击垮。相反，这场战争暴露了旨在缓冲投资者应对混乱局面的多元化策略的局限性。【原文：The Iran war rattled but didn’t break Wall Street this week. Instead it exposed the limits of diversification strategies built to cushion investors against chaos.】

item.title: 特朗普要求伊朗让步，美国则致力于稳定能源市场
item.description: 在战争进入第七天之际，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普要求伊朗投降，暗示这场冲突可能持续更长时间。尽管能源市场动荡不安，且外界担忧美国是否拥有足够的军事储备来无限期持续作战，特朗普仍坚持这一立场。【原文：President Donald Trump demanded Iran capitulate in the war’s seventh day, suggesting a longer timeframe for the conflict even amid energy-market tumult and worries about whether the US has the military stockpiles to carry on the fight indefinitely.】

item.title: 摩根大通将更多艺电收购融资转向垃圾债券
item.description: 据知情人士透露，摩根大通正将艺电公司创纪录杠杆收购案的债务融资更多转向垃圾债券。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. is shifting more of the debt financing for the record leveraged buyout of Electronic Arts Inc. toward junk bonds, according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 美国推出200亿美元再保险计划以缓解墨西哥湾石油贸易
item.description: 特朗普政府宣布了一项200亿美元的再保险计划，旨在重振霍尔木兹海峡的航运业。由于美国和以色列对伊朗的袭击，该海峡的航运几乎完全停滞。【原文：The Trump administration announced a $20 billion reinsurance program aimed at reviving shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, where traffic has all but stopped amid the US and Israeli attacks on Iran.】

item.title: 千禧银行在奖金发放后人员流动中聘用四名城堡证券交易员
item.description: 千禧管理公司从竞争对手城堡基金挖走了四名股票挑选专家，这家多元策略对冲基金巨头正为争夺人才展开角逐，以应对其资产规模的激增。【原文：Millennium Management hired four stock pickers from rival Citadel as the multistrategy hedge fund giants battle over talent to help manage their soaring assets.】

item.title: 人工智能芯片制造商Cerebras选择摩根士丹利作为首次公开募股（IPO）的承销商。
item.description: 知情人士透露，人工智能芯片制造商Cerebras Systems公司已选定摩根士丹利作为其首次公开募股的主承销商，该公司正重新启动上市计划。【原文：Cerebras Systems Inc. has picked Morgan Stanley to lead its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as the artificial intelligence chipmaker mounts a renewed attempt to go public.】

item.title: 华尔街监管机构讨论进驻同一栋大楼
item.description: 据知情人士透露，华尔街两大顶级监管机构正商讨搬迁计划，拟入驻华盛顿同一栋建筑群，该建筑群距美国国会大厦仅数步之遥。【原文：Wall Street’s two top regulators are discussing plans to move into the same building complex in Washington just steps from the US Capitol, according to people familiar with the matter.】
